title: bus.bead.closed v1
description: A bead was closed/completed in a project's .beads/ tracker. Emitted by bd hooks on 'bd close'. Note: CloudEvent type is 'bus.bead.closed' (no .v1 suffix) so redis-mirror passes these through without schema validation. bus.bead.lifecycle.v1 is hearth-loom's own internal lifecycle (container_died, etc.) and is a separate, unrelated stream.
